apple_pie.healthy: Low - High in sugar and saturated fats
apple_pie.warning: Not suitable for diabetics or those looking to lose weight

baby_back_ribs.healthy: Medium - High protein but rich in saturated fats
baby_back_ribs.warning: High in sodium and fats; caution for heart patients

baklava.healthy: Very Low - Very high calories from sugar and fats
baklava.warning: Dangerous for diabetics; contains nuts (allergy risk)

beef_carpaccio.healthy: High - Pure protein and low calories
beef_carpaccio.warning: Raw meat; not recommended for pregnant women or immunocompromised individuals

beef_tartare.warning: Raw meat; risk of bacterial contamination if not extremely fresh

beet_salad.healthy: Very High - Packed with fiber and vitamins
beet_salad.warning: May affect kidney stone patients (high in oxalates)

beignets.healthy: Low - Fried dough and powdered sugar
beignets.warning: High in carbs and sugar; spikes blood sugar rapidly

bibimbap.warning: Watch the amount of added sauce (soy) due to high salt content

bread_pudding.healthy: Low - Dessert rich in carbohydrates and fats

breakfast_burrito.healthy: Medium - Filling and high in protein
breakfast_burrito.warning: High in calories and sodium depending on ingredients (sausage/cheese)

bruschetta.healthy: High - Based on olive oil and tomatoes

caesar_salad.healthy: Medium - Excellent greens but the dressing is very fatty
caesar_salad.warning: Dressing is high in calories, fats, and sodium

cannoli.healthy: Low - Fried pastry filled with sweetened cream
cannoli.warning: High in sugar and saturated fats

caprese_salad.healthy: High - Healthy fats from olive oil and protein from mozzarella
caprese_salad.warning: Monitor cheese intake for those with high cholesterol

carrot_cake.healthy: Low - Despite the carrots, it is loaded with oil and sugar

ceviche.healthy: Very High - Lean protein and almost zero fat
ceviche.warning: Raw fish; risk for pregnant women and immunocompromised individuals

cheesecake.healthy: Low - High in calories and saturated fats
cheesecake.warning: Not suitable for diabetics or those with high cholesterol

cheese_plate.healthy: Medium - Rich in calcium and protein but very high in fat
cheese_plate.warning: High in sodium and saturated fats; caution for hypertensive patients

chicken_curry.healthy: Medium - Depends on the amount of oil or cream added
chicken_curry.warning: May be high in sodium and spicy spices

chicken_quesadilla.healthy: Medium - A mix of protein and carbohydrates
chicken_quesadilla.warning: High in calories due to cheese and white flour tortillas

chicken_wings.healthy: Low - Fried and often coated in fatty sauces
chicken_wings.warning: Very high in trans fats and sodium

chocolate_cake.healthy: Low - Loaded with sugars and added fats
chocolate_cake.warning: Causes a rapid spike in blood sugar levels

chocolate_mousse.healthy: Low - Rich in cream and sugar
chocolate_mousse.warning: High in calories and saturated fats

churros.healthy: Low - Fried dough coated in sugar

clam_chowder.healthy: Medium - Rich in minerals but very creamy
clam_chowder.warning: Contains heavy cream and high sodium; shellfish allergy risk

club_sandwich.healthy: Medium - Complete meal, but bread and mayo increase calories
club_sandwich.warning: May contain processed meats (linked to heart disease)

crab_cakes.healthy: Medium - Seafood protein but typically fried
crab_cakes.warning: Shellfish allergy warning and high added fats

creme_brulee.healthy: Low - Very high in fat and sugar
creme_brulee.warning: Calorie bomb from sugar and heavy cream

croque_madame.healthy: Low - Very heavy (butter, bechamel, and cheese)
croque_madame.warning: Very high in cholesterol and saturated fats

cup_cakes.healthy: Low - High sugar and refined white flour
cup_cakes.warning: Lacks fiber and promotes rapid weight gain

deviled_eggs.healthy: Medium - High protein but mayo adds significant fat

donuts.healthy: Very Low - Deep-fried with sugar and chocolate
donuts.warning: Rich in trans fats which harm arterial health

dumplings.healthy: Medium - Depends on filling (steamed is better than fried)
dumplings.warning: Watch out for high sodium in the dipping soy sauce

edamame.healthy: Very High - Excellent plant-based protein and fiber
edamame.warning: Safe unless there is a soy allergy

eggs_benedict.healthy: Low to Medium - Due to the fatty hollandaise sauce
eggs_benedict.warning: Very high in fat, salt, and cholesterol

escargots.healthy: High - Excellent protein and low fat (without butter)
escargots.warning: Often served with heavy butter, increasing calories and saturated fats

falafel.healthy: Medium - Good source of plant-based protein but deep-fried
falafel.warning: Not ideal for heart patients due to frying; high in sodium

filet_mignon.healthy: High - One of the leanest and most protein-rich red meats
filet_mignon.warning: Consume in moderation for gout or high cholesterol patients

fish_and_chips.healthy: Low - Primarily a deep-fried dish high in carbohydrates
fish_and_chips.warning: Contains high levels of trans fats and refined carbs

foie_gras.healthy: Very Low - Extremely rich in saturated fats and cholesterol
foie_gras.warning: High risk for heart and arterial health

french_fries.healthy: Low - Fried starches lacking significant fiber
french_fries.warning: Linked to weight gain and heart disease due to hydrogenated oils

french_onion_soup.healthy: Medium - Onions are beneficial, but cheese and bread increase calories

french_toast.healthy: Low to Medium - High in carbohydrates and sugars
french_toast.warning: Spikes blood sugar quickly; whole wheat bread is preferred

fried_calamari.healthy: Low to Medium - Seafood protein but the outer layer is deep-fried
fried_calamari.warning: High in cholesterol and fat due to heavy frying

fried_rice.healthy: Medium - Depends on the amount of oil and added ingredients
fried_rice.warning: High in carbs and sodium (due to soy sauce)

frozen_yogurt.healthy: Medium - Lighter alternative to ice cream but rich in sugar
frozen_yogurt.warning: Contains many added sugars that may mislead dieters

garlic_bread.healthy: Low - High in carbs and saturated fats (butter)
garlic_bread.warning: Digests quickly and raises blood sugar; calorie-dense

gnocchi.healthy: Medium - Potato-based dough high in carbohydrates

greek_salad.healthy: Very High - Fresh vegetables and healthy fats (olive oil)
greek_salad.warning: Watch feta cheese and olive portions for hypertensive patients (salt)

grilled_cheese_sandwich.healthy: Low to Medium - Fatty and high in carbohydrates
grilled_cheese_sandwich.warning: Rich in saturated fats and sodium

grilled_salmon.healthy: Very High - Top-tier source of Omega-3 and protein
grilled_salmon.warning: One of the best meals for heart and brain health

guacamole.healthy: High - Healthy unsaturated fats very beneficial for the heart
guacamole.warning: Healthy but calorie-dense; should be eaten in moderation

gyoza.healthy: Medium - Steamed is preferred over fried
gyoza.warning: Contains high sodium in the dough and accompanying sauce

hamburger.healthy: Medium to Low - Depends on meat quality and toppings
hamburger.warning: Fast food versions contain dangerous trans fats and sodium

hot_and_sour_soup.warning: Can be very high in salt (sodium)

hot_dog.healthy: Very Low - Processed meat filled with additives
hot_dog.warning: Linked to heart disease and cancer due to nitrates and sodium

huevos_rancheros.warning: Avoid over-frying the tortilla to reduce calorie count

hummus.healthy: Very High - Plant-based protein and healthy fats (tahini)
hummus.warning: Very healthy but calorie-dense; stick to recommended portions

ice_cream.healthy: Low - High sugar and saturated fats
ice_cream.warning: Causes weight gain and fluctuations in sugar levels

lasagna.healthy: Medium to Low - Heavy meal rich in carbs and fats
lasagna.warning: Contains many layers of cheese and pasta; high in calories

lobster_bisque.healthy: Low - Rich in cream and butter despite shellfish benefits
lobster_bisque.warning: High in saturated fats and sodium; caution for heart patients

lobster_roll_sandwich.healthy: Medium to Low - Great seafood protein but mayo/bread raise calories
lobster_roll_sandwich.warning: High in cholesterol and refined carbohydrates

macaroni_and_cheese.healthy: Low - Processed carbs and high saturated fats
macaroni_and_cheese.warning: Lacks fiber and causes rapid weight gain

macarons.healthy: Very Low - Pure sugar and almond flour
macarons.warning: Extremely high in sugars; high risk for diabetics

miso_soup.healthy: High - Low calorie and good for digestion (probiotics)
miso_soup.warning: Very high in sodium; unsuitable for high blood pressure patients

mussels.healthy: Very High - Lean protein, iron, and Omega-3
mussels.warning: Alert for seafood allergies and bacterial toxins

nachos.healthy: Very Low - Saturated fats, salts, and empty calories
nachos.warning: Causes inflammation and high blood pressure due to sodium/oils

omelette.healthy: High - Excellent source of protein and vitamins
omelette.warning: Watch the amount of added butter or cheese (cholesterol)

onion_rings.healthy: Very Low - Fried starches in heavy oil
onion_rings.warning: Rich in trans fats that harm the heart and arteries

oysters.healthy: Very High - Rich in zinc and protein; low calorie
oysters.warning: May carry bacteria if eaten raw; risk for immunocompromised individuals

pad_thai.healthy: Medium to Low - High carbs with sugar and sodium
pad_thai.warning: High in calories from sugar and oils; caution for diabetics

paella.healthy: Medium - Complete meal but high in carbs (rice)
paella.warning: High in sodium; best to reduce added salt

pancakes.healthy: Low - Refined carbs often eaten with sugars
pancakes.warning: Raises insulin levels quickly in the blood

panna_cotta.warning: High in saturated fats and added sugars

peking_duck.healthy: Medium to Low - High protein but the skin is very fatty
peking_duck.warning: High in calories, fat, and salt (accompanying sauce)

pho.healthy: High - Nutritious soup with protein and fresh herbs
pho.warning: Sodium levels in the broth can be very high

pizza.healthy: Low to Medium - Carbs, cheeses, and fats
pizza.warning: Rich in sodium and saturated fats; causes rapid weight gain

pork_chop.healthy: Medium - High protein but contains saturated fats
pork_chop.warning: Religious dietary warning (pork); high in cholesterol

poutine.healthy: Very Low - Fried potatoes, cheese, and heavy gravy
poutine.warning: Dangerous mix of sodium, fat, and high calories

prime_rib.healthy: Medium - Excellent protein but one of the fattiest cuts
prime_rib.warning: Risk for heart patients due to high saturated fats

pulled_pork_sandwich.healthy: Low - Protein mixed with sugary sauce and white bread
pulled_pork_sandwich.warning: Religious dietary warning (pork); high sugar calories

ramen.healthy: Low - Refined starches and excessive sodium
ramen.warning: Linked to high blood pressure and heart disease due to salt

ravioli.healthy: Medium - Dough filled with protein or cheeses
ravioli.warning: High in carbs and calories depending on the sauce (white/red)

red_velvet_cake.healthy: Very Low - Sugars, fats, and artificial colors
red_velvet_cake.warning: Empty calories; causes inflammation and sugar swings

risotto.healthy: Medium to Low - Processed rice with butter and cheese
risotto.warning: High in carbohydrates and saturated fats; raises blood sugar

samosa.healthy: Low - Deep-fried pastry with high carb and fat content
samosa.warning: High in trans fats and sodium; can lead to weight gain

sashimi.healthy: Very High - Pure protein and healthy Omega-3 fats
sashimi.warning: Raw fish risk; avoid if pregnant or immunocompromised

scallops.healthy: High - Lean protein and rich in minerals like magnesium
scallops.warning: High in cholesterol; potential shellfish allergy

seaweed_salad.healthy: High - Low calorie and packed with iodine and vitamins
seaweed_salad.warning: Can be high in sodium and sugar depending on the dressing

shrimp_and_grits.healthy: Medium to Low - High protein but heavy on butter and cream
shrimp_and_grits.warning: High in saturated fats and sodium

spaghetti_bolognese.healthy: Medium - Good balance of carbs and protein
spaghetti_bolognese.warning: High in refined carbs; watch the portion size

spaghetti_carbonara.healthy: Low - Extremely high in saturated fats (cheese, egg, pancetta)
spaghetti_carbonara.warning: Very high calorie density and sodium

spring_rolls.healthy: Low - Mostly fried dough with minimal nutrients

steak.healthy: Medium - Excellent protein and iron source
steak.warning: High in saturated fats; linked to heart issues if eaten daily

strawberry_shortcake.healthy: Low - High sugar and refined flour

sushi.warning: Watch out for 'Special Rolls' with mayo/tempura (high fat)

tacos.healthy: Medium - Depends on the protein and toppings
tacos.warning: Can be high in sodium and saturated fats if using fatty meats

takoyaki.healthy: Low - Fried batter with heavy mayo/sauce
takoyaki.warning: High in refined carbs and sodium

tiramisu.healthy: Low - High in sugar, fat, and caffeine
tiramisu.warning: Very calorie-dense; contains raw egg and alcohol

tuna_tartare.healthy: High - Lean protein and healthy fats
tuna_tartare.warning: Mercury concerns with high tuna intake; raw food risk

waffles.healthy: Low - Purely processed carbs and sugar
waffles.warning: High glycemic index; typically served with high-sugar syrups
